name: Certn
description: Monitor Certn background check platform for employee verification and access management compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Certn at https://app.certn.co/login
2. Click the Partner tab in the dashboard
3. Click Refresh Keys to generate a new Client ID and Secret
4. Copy both values immediately (Secret is only shown once)
5. Paste them here

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Certn Dashboard - Partner tab - API Keys

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Generated when creating/refreshing API keys in the Partner tab. Only shown once at creation time.

checks.name: Employee Verification
checks.description: Verifies that background checks are being conducted through Certn for employee screening

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews users with access to the Certn background check platform
